channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: KRPG Enchantment
item.description: Adds MC-like enchantment system to VS.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: Sythet Terratag
item.description: Terratag sound for the Sythet server

item.title: Table Expansion
item.description: Allows combining several identical tables in the crafting grid to build larger ones.

item.title: Mobility
item.description: Step Up / Climb / Grab / Auto Walk / Auto Run

item.title: This Mod Sucks
item.description: Automatic drop pickup on a timer, fully adjustable config

item.title: CollapseStory
item.description: Adds structural and material physics to structural blocks, and greatly expands beam functionality.

item.title: Locust Harvest
item.description: Killed locusts drop a Dead Locust item you smelt in a crucible to recover Bronze (5 per ingot).

item.title: Rustmatica EasyPlace
item.description: Addon to Rustmatica, streamlining the building process of schematics

item.title: Alchemy
item.description: Potion mod that adds buffs to the player.

item.title: Rustmatica
item.description: A building assistant mod that allows you to save, load and visualize block structures

item.title: Molds
item.description: New molds for your survival.

item.title: Galeret
item.description: A race of cat people based on kahjit

item.title: LSPatches
item.description: To be used on a private server

item.title: Long term food
item.description: Adds food that does not spoil for a very long time.

item.title: Better Jungles (and survival modpack)
item.description: More realistic Jungles, some survival gameplay changes - ideally as part of the modpack listed below

item.title: Item Pickup Notifier
item.description: Item Pickup Notifier shows a simple overlay that displays the information of items you pick up

item.title: More Dry Grass Fix
item.description: Makes More Dry Grass work again on current game versions

item.title: NDL ExpandedGrowth (Tree Growth Module)
item.description: Adds a method for growing larger variants of trees.

item.title: Saplings Grow Resin/Moss/Vines
item.description: Saplings generate resin/moss/vines when they grow similar to probabilities during worldgen

item.title: Boric Alchemy
item.description: Boric Alchemy adds chemical routes to create and refine resources, and create alchemical marvels!

item.title: C&N Jewelry
item.description: Rough/cut gems/jewelry and encrusting in the armor/tools with buffs

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Animalica Core
item.description: Core mod for playable animals. Does nothing on it's own

item.title: Animalica - Foxes, Wolves & Hyenas
item.description: Adds Foxes, Wolves, and Hyenas as player choices!

item.title: Animalica - Bears
item.description: Adds Bears as player choices

item.title: Animalica - Small & Odd
item.description: Adds the small goober animals like raccoons, chickens, and rabbits as players

item.title: Animalica - Hooved Animals
item.description: Adds all the hooved animals as playable models!

item.title: Animalica - Compatibility
item.description: Adds a small list of modded animals as players!

item.title: QoL Crafts Updated
item.description: A dirty patch to make QoL Crafts stable and remove stuff I didn't use.
